scenarios.name: limit_maker_full_fill
scenarios.requirement: A resting maker limit order fills completely after the simulated book crosses it.

scenarios.name: limit_unfilled_then_expired
scenarios.requirement: A non-crossing immediate limit order remains unfilled and expires deterministically.

scenarios.name: partial_fill_then_cancel
scenarios.requirement: A maker order can partially fill before its remaining quantity is cancelled.

scenarios.name: fallback_taker
scenarios.requirement: An expired maker attempt can be replaced by a bounded taker fallback.

scenarios.name: market_with_slippage
scenarios.requirement: A market fill applies and reports a deterministic non-zero slippage model.

scenarios.name: insufficient_balance
scenarios.requirement: An order whose initial margin exceeds available balance is rejected.

scenarios.name: precision_reject
scenarios.requirement: An order violating price or quantity precision is rejected before acceptance.

scenarios.name: leverage_cap_reject
scenarios.requirement: An order above the instrument leverage cap is rejected.

scenarios.name: duplicate_client_order_id
scenarios.requirement: Replaying a client order identifier does not create a second order or fill.

scenarios.name: timeout_after_acceptance
scenarios.requirement: A lost response after acceptance is ambiguous and an identical retry is idempotent.

scenarios.name: stop_loss_attach_success
scenarios.requirement: A filled entry immediately creates a full-size reduce-only simulated stop loss.

scenarios.name: stop_loss_attach_failure
scenarios.requirement: A stop attachment failure is explicit and requires the documented compensation action.

scenarios.name: tp1_then_trailing
scenarios.requirement: A partial TP1 fill arms a trailing stop for the remaining position.

scenarios.name: gap_at_stop_loss
scenarios.requirement: A price gap through the stop fills at the next available simulated book price.

scenarios.name: websocket_disconnect_resync
scenarios.requirement: A deterministic private WebSocket disconnect resumes without event loss or duplication.

scenarios.name: duplicate_out_of_order_event
scenarios.requirement: Duplicate and out-of-order private events are injected, deduplicated and reconciled.

scenarios.name: restart_with_open_position
scenarios.requirement: A protected open position and event sequence survive a Paper state restart.

scenarios.name: funding
scenarios.requirement: Positive and negative funding are accrued and reported separately from fees.

scenarios.name: one_way_conflict
scenarios.requirement: A conflicting One-Way position intent is rejected without changing exposure.

scenarios.name: dry_run_multi_profiles_same_symbol
scenarios.requirement: Two dry-run profiles targeting the same symbol preserve profile isolation and the global exposure lock.
